package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_constructor_instantiates_dependencies_internally: Constructors that create repositories, clients, or loggers internally instead of accepting them explicitly.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule163NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule163NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule163NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario163Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule163NegativeService, input Rule163NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
